title: Bunkers, Machines & Nuclear Weapons
body:
The mod Bunkers, Machines & Nuclear Weapons (BMNW for short) adds various blocks & devices to aid you in destroying and protecting your Minecraft world.

Explore to find structures, build machines to get rare items to build better machines and someday maybe nuke a village.

_We are not held responsible for any villager casualties._

 

With special thanks to:
- Yanosiq, for supporting me and making le funny video's
- Wolfie, for cooking the mod name
- Kaupenjoe, for having free tutorials which greatly helped me learn modding
- Wikipedia, for basically making this thing possible

Things worth reading:
- There's JEI integration, installing it is recommended
- It's still in beta, some things may be broken
